title: Mekanism: Advanced Generators
description: Mekanism Multiblock works in One Block!! It is very lightweight and optimized.
body: # How to Make ### Store all the items in the chest and Shift+Right-Click with the wrench of the machine. # Addons ### **・** Mekanism: Advanced Core ( [URL](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism-advanced-core) ) # Recipes ## Advanced Fission Reactor ![Advanced Fission Reactor Cost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00a850e4b4919ed57dbaa7c79d7dbb5e1e0f5634.png) ## Advanced Turbine ![Advanced Turbine Cost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5dc68d559aa180746cba64b97e94cf04177087.png)   ## Advanced SPS ![Advanced SPS Cost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e9c4ce89b67ef7a1cedabcd6eb6866eed0924c.png)    # How to Build ## Advanced Fission Reactor and Turbine Advanced Turbine puts Energy into your battery from only **NORTH FACE** !! Fill Advanced Fission Reactor with much water. Look for the recipes about Item Fissile Fuel and Item Nuclear Waste with JEI. ![How to Build](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aeb2d9a622ee42af5da19ee4cfb2190fe69ee43.png)   ## Advanced SPS First Step:  Advanced SPS makes 1 Antimatter Dust from 10 Polonium Pellets. Second Step:  Advanced SPS makes 1 Antimatter Shard from 10 Antimatter Dust. Third Step:   Chemical Oxidizer makes 100mB Antimatter from 1 Antimatter Shard.   In other words, 1000 Polonium Pellets is needed to make 1000mB Antimatter. ![How to build Advanced SPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19b5ffba7cfe1639116242bc3bd53af27baf97e.png)
